target_name: Sun Tzu Attack — Does /compare Page Land the Killing Blow?
context: Sun Tzu oracle (q-agi-052): 'The supreme art of war is to subdue the enemy without fighting.' The /compare page is Solace's strategic weapon. Does it mention the WINNING differentiators: evidence trail, OAuth3 consent, audit receipts, compliance? A compare page that lists features but doesn't name WHY Solace wins is strategically weak. Check: does /compare contain the keywords that represent Solace's real differentiators vs competitors?
